ab: hmcwa kayan coni?
en: A: How’s the weather today?

ab: ghiyaq hayi kayal, klokah mnbux kilux qsya.
ch: B:天氣有點冷，要多喝熱水。
en: It’s a bit cold, so you need to drink more warm water.

ab: maha nanu kayan coni?
en: How’s the weather today?

ab: mkilux hayi kayan, klokah mnbux qsya.
en: It’s a bit hot, so you need to drink more water.

ab: maha nanu kayan te tanux coni?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: tyaba wagi nya, qblaq mlahang he.
en: The sun is bright and remember to wear sunscreen.

ab: maha nanu kayan te tanux coni?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: piyux yulung nya, uka wagi nya.
en: There are a lot of clouds but no sun in the sky.

ab: maha nanu kayan cugan?
en: How is the weather tomorrow?

ab: uka wagi nya cugan, piyux yulung, tyaba behuy.
ch: B:明天沒有太陽，雲很多，風很大。
en: It will be cloudy and windy but not sunny tomorrow.

ab: mnha nanu kayan nya ryax qaca?
en: How was the weather that day?

ab: ghiyaq ryax qani, kpiyux mlukus musa su tanux.
ch: B:這天有點冷，出門要穿外套。
en: It was a bit cold and you needed to wear a jacket when you went outside.

ab: ryax hngawan qani maha nanu kayan nya?
en: How’s the weather on the weekend?

ab: ryax hngawan qani ga blaq kayan.
en: It will be sunny on the weekend.

ab: pqwalax ryax na qaca?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: ryax qaca ga blaq kayan nya, iyat pqwalax.
ch: B:那天天氣晴朗，不會下雨。
en: It will have no rain and be sunny that day.

ab: pqwalax ryax na qaca?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: uya, pqwalax ryax na qaca.
en: Yes, it will be rainy that day.

ab: nyan qmwalax mwani?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: mswat qwalax nya la, phtux wagi la.
en: The rain stops and the sun comes out.

ab: nyan qmwalax mwani?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: qmwalax la, ini cu aray bruku.
en: It is raining and I don’t have an umbrella with me.

ab: cyan qmwalax te tanux?
en: Is it raining outside?

ab: ini qwalax mwani, babaw knryax ga baq mqwalax, aray bruku.
ch: B:現在沒有下雨，中午過後會下雨，出門要帶傘。
en: It is not raining now, but it will be rainy in the afternoon, so you need to bring an umbrella when you go out.

ab: qmisan kawas ga mwah ghiyaq kayan nya?
en: Will it be very cold in winter next year?

ab: uya, qmisan kawas ga mwah ghiyaq, kpiyux mlukus kya.
ch: B:是，明年冬天會很冷，要穿很多衣服。
en: Yes, it will be very cold in winter next year, so you need to put on extra layers.

ab: ’bagan pilax qani ga baq mkilux kayan nya?
en: Will it be very hot in summer this year?

ab: uya, baq mkilux kayan nya, klokah mnbux qsya.
ch: B:是，夏天會很熱，要多喝水。
en: Yes, it will be very hot and you need to drink more water.

ab: smoya su ryax na tmangux abax?
en: Do you like spring?

ab: smoya cu ryax na tmangux abax, kkilux kayan nya.
ch: B:我喜歡春天，天氣很溫暖。
en: I like spring because the weather is warm.

ab: smoya su ryax na hoqan abax?
en: Do you like autumn?

ab: ini cu soya ryax na hoqan abax, piyux bbehuy nya.
ch: B:我不喜歡秋天，秋天有好多颱風。
en: I don’t like autumn because there are lots of typhoons in autumn.
